decisions.decision: Use Hybrid Approach for Omnichannel Interactive Messaging
decisions.rationale: Avoid vendor lock-in for standard features but allow native WABA JSON escapes
Match industry standard for Telegram and build competitive edge on Instagram

next_action: Start a new phase or execute a phase from the v1.4 milestone.
context_notes: We just finished an exploration session for Telegram and Instagram rich messaging, and appended new phases 26 and 27 to the ROADMAP.
